title: Things need a tool
description: Datapack that gives "proper tools" for most blocks that currently do not have proper tools
body:
> # This repository has been merged into [PurpurPacks](https://modrinth.com/user/PurpurMC/datapacks) as seperate modules, any further development on this datapack will be done there - [Light Source Blocks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-pickaxe-effective-light-source-blocks) - [Froglights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-hoe-effective-froglights) - [Reinforced Deepslate](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-pickaxe-effective-reinforced-deepslate) - [Skulls](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-axe-effective-skulls) - [Glass](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-pickaxe-effective-glass) - [Cactus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hoe-effective-cactus) # Things Need A Tool This is a Minecraft datapack that adds tool requirements for blocks that did not have a proper tool, making it easier and faster to break them. ## What it does This datapack groups the most commonly-used blocks that did not have a correct tool into tool categories. This means you no longer need to spend hours breaking blocks with the wrong tool, and the enchantment 'efficiency' now applies to these blocks, making it even faster to break them. ## Changes made The following blocks are now grouped under these tool categories: ### Pickaxe
  • Tinted glass
  • White, orange, magenta, light blue, yellow, lime, pink, gray, light gray, cyan, purple, blue, brown, green, red and black stained glass
  • Glass
  • Glass pane
  • White, orange, magenta, light blue, yellow, lime, pink, gray, light gray, cyan, purple, blue, brown, green, red and black stained glass pane
  • Beacon
  • Glowstone
  • Sea lantern
  • Redstone lantern
  • Reinforced deepslate
### Hoe
  • Pearlescent, ochre and verdant froglight
  • Cactus
### Axe
  • Skeleton skull
  • Wither skeleton skull
  • Zombie head
  • Player head
  • Creeper head
  • Dragon head
  • Piglin head
  • Skeleton wall skull
  • Wither skeleton wall skull
  • Zombie wall head
  • Player wall head
  • Creeper wall head
  • Dragon wall head
  • Piglin wall head
  • Honeycomb block
